title: Section 1
content: 1(1) This Act may be called the Union Duties of Excise (Distribution) Act, 1979. (2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 1st day of April, 1979.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 31 of 1995, s. 2, for "second report dated the 18th day of December, 1989" (w.e.f. 1-4-1995).
